Localization.Description: Application parameters specified in the configuration are removed from a device

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The parameters of application {object.id} are removed from device {datafield3} (SN: {datafield4}, IMEI: {datafield1}, UDID: {datafield2}, OS: {datafield6} {datafield5}) of user {subject.account.fullname} on host {event_src.host}
